contentHeader.name: ifmCR711S_TemplateProject
contentHeader.Comment: Project template with CR711S configured 2.25MByte Standard 2.25MByte Safety

ProjectInformation.property: Project template with CR711S configured 2.25MByte Standard 2.25MByte Safety

documentation.xhtml: THIS EVL IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT MODIFY THESE ATTRIBUTES.

fbHB_Manual_Mon : FB_HeartBeat; //Ger error om man har dessa här då FB_HeartBeat inte finns i Safety fbHB_Remote_Mon : FB_HeartBeat; //Blir problem om man sätter HeartBeat i Safety pga TON, ska försöka hitta en lösning
